name: OnKure Therapeutics, Inc.
business: OnKure Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery and development of precision medicines that target biologically validated drivers of cancers and other diseases. Its lead product candidate, OKI-219, is a highly selective inhibitor of PI3K H1047R being developed initially for advanced breast cancer subtypes (HR+/HER2- and HER2+). The company has no products approved for commercial sale and has never generated revenue from product sales.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery and development of precision medicines that target biologically validated drivers of cancers and other diseases that are underserved by available therapies.

catalysts.event: Provide additional data from PIKture-01 Phase 1 clinical trial
catalysts.sentence: We plan to provide additional data in the first quarter of 2026.
